expectations.text: Despite the casual/minimal prompt, output still performs research on Buffer rather than just asking for more context
expectations.evidence: WebFetch used on buffer.com. Full brief produced despite minimal input — no request for clarification, no 'I need more info' response.

expectations.text: Brief includes specific factual details about Buffer (ARR, team size, product features, or target customers)
expectations.evidence: Mentions: $24.6M ARR, 73,845 customers, 223,783 MAU, 73 employees across 15 countries, founded 2010 by Joel Gascoigne, 11 supported social networks, 5 product modules.

expectations.text: Output includes a structured NexusPoint Positioning section with a specific best angle for Buffer
expectations.evidence: NexusPoint Positioning section with Best angle: 'We build the custom AI tools and automation systems that fast-moving SaaS teams like yours need but don't have the bandwidth to build in-house.' Three services mapped.

expectations.text: Output includes at least 3 actionable discovery questions tailored to Buffer
expectations.evidence: 4 questions, all specific to Buffer's context: references lean team (73 people), their AI investment, internal engineering focus, and decision-making process.
